frontmatter.title: Theories of presheaf type
frontmatter.meta: @article{beke-2004, ISSN = {00224812}, URL = {http://www.jstor.org/stable/30041767}, author = {Tibor Beke}, journal = {The Journal of Symbolic Logic}, number = {3}, pages = {923--934}, publisher = {[Association for Symbolic Logic, Cambridge University Press]}, title = {Theories of Presheaf Type}, volume = {69}, year = {2004} }
